ValidationRule.description: Prevents changes to the rollup field on Approved/Active journey plans. Admins with the Bypass_Journey_Plan_Approval_Lock custom permission are exempt so they can regenerate plans and the automatic rollup update (Total_Planned_Days__c / Total_Planned_Visits__c) still succeeds after plan-day inserts and deletes.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot modify an approved or active Journey Plan. Please create a new plan or request revision.
